## Checklist
- [ ] I read `AGENTS.md` and followed its conventions.
- [ ] `bash scripts/verify-harness.sh` passes.
- [ ] Markdown uses no artificial line breaks (one paragraph = one line).
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` still fits under the 32 KiB Codex cap (if I touched it).
- [ ] Canonical `.agents/agents/*.md` personas and their `.codex/agents/*.toml` mirrors are in sync (if I touched personas).
- [ ] I updated `docs/` (CURRENT.md / DECISIONS.md / specs / plans) where relevant.
